title: First Close of Emerald Global Water Fund II Reaches EUR 60 Million
author: Dr. Helge Daebel
description: Emerald Technology Ventures announced the first close of its Global Water Fund II at €60 million, with anchor investments from Veralto and Ecolab. The fund aims to invest in water innovation technologies addressing global water challenges across infrastructure, treatment, and digital monitoring.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Actively investing in water technology solutions and demonstrating commitment to sustainable innovation
Continuing long-term investment in water technology and innovation sector

title: Veralto Announces Quarterly Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Veralto, a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.11 per share, payable on July 31, 2025 to holders of record as of June 30, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a quarterly dividend, which is generally seen as a positive sign for shareholders.

title: Veralto Announces Increase in Quarterly Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Veralto, a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions, announced a 22% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.11 per share, payable on January 31, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced an increase in its quarterly dividend, which is generally seen as a positive sign for investors.

title: Veralto Announces Quarterly Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Veralto, a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.09 per share, payable on October 31, 2024 to holders of record as of September 27, 2024.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a quarterly cash dividend, indicating financial stability and shareholder returns.
